title: Villager Drops
description: Makes villagers drop their inventory when killed.
body:
# Villager Drops ### I wanted to update this mod, but couldn't find the project on my hard drive and the github link seems to be a 404. I don't know how this happened, but I guess there will be no more updates Makes villagers drop their inventory when killed.
Half of the items that a villager gets from a trade are added into their inventory.
